safe_scope: Small digital products, public-safe reviews, and fixed-price setup services only. No security, vulnerability, exploit, bypass, spam, fake-review, credential, private analytics, or personal-data scraping work.
privacy_note: Use public GitHub issues only for public-safe questions. Send delivery email, payer name/email prefix, approximate payment time, and private project context by email.

offers.name: Repo-to-Revenue Launch Bundle
offers.best_for: Indie builders who want AI Money Stack with the Safe Daily Revenue Routine plus GitHub Pages Storefront Starter in one launch bundle.
offers.refund_support: 14-day refund if the ZIP does not unzip, one of the included paid ZIPs is missing, or manifest hashes do not match. No revenue guarantees.
